info.longName: Invesco Optimum Yield Diversified Commodity Strategy No K-1 ETF

funds_data.description: The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing in a combination of financial instruments that are economically linked to the world's most heavily traded commodities. Commodities are assets that have tangible properties, such as oil, agricultural produce or raw metals.

top_holdings.Name: Invesco Premier US Government Money Inst
